_comment: OIDC trust policy for IAM role agrisync-snapshot-dev.
Restricts who can assume this role via GitHub Actions OIDC:
- ref: refs/heads/akash_edits (only this branch can mint workflow-OIDC tokens)
Defense-in-depth — workflow YAML also enforces ALLOWED_ACTORS=aakasharve.
Even if the IAM trust accepts the assertion, the workflow step fails for any
actor not on the allow-list before any AWS call runs.
